title: Dismember
description: Machines controlled and powered by blood.
body:
# DISMEMBER

![Tinker View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64f37d8f275637af35f6412f4b7f9dd31fd742c0_0.webp)

## What is Dismember?
Dismember is a mod allowing for advanced automation*, processing and logistics* to exist within your minecraft world! Being powered through blood flow and blood pressure, you can create machines in order to power your entire base! 

*- These features are unfinished currently. Dismember is still in beta, it is an unfinished project and bugs are expected.

## What to expect:
- Large autosorting storage systems
- Fun and intuitive survival friendly movement
- Bearings and Pistons to move your world around in a satisfying way.

### Dismember is heavily inspired by the Create mod, make sure to check that out :3

## Again, Dismember is still in beta. It is an unfinished project and bugs **are** expected.
